title: iPhone 18 To Launch With These Big Upgrades Over iPhone 17: What To Expect From Apple
author: Rahul Chaurasia

title: iPhone 18 To Launch With These Big Upgrades Over iPhone 17: What To Expect From Apple
author: Rahul Chaurasia

content.text: The upcoming Apple iPhone 18 is generating buzz with leaks indicating significant upgrades in several areas compared to its predecessor. Anticipated improvements include a larger battery exceeding 4000mAh for enhanced longevity.

Apple iPhone 18 has been making it to the headlines for a long time now. Leaks and rumours around the phone suggest the device will bring some major upgrades over its predecessor in departments like battery, Siri, processor, and more.

On that note, here is everything that you need to know about the upcoming smartphone by Apple. One thing before we start is that the latest rumours point towards a March 2027 launch of iPhone 18 due to a massive change in the release cycle of iPhones.
